name: rendered-semantic-qa
description: Per-row QA of rendered outbound email copy (subject + body + persona context). Catches null-variable collapse, pronoun/title/tense mismatch, AI-slop formulas, wrong EDP register, em-dashes, and spam triggers before copy ships to Bison.

input_schema.subject: string — rendered email subject (no {{}} tokens should remain)
input_schema.body: string — rendered email body (no {{}} tokens should remain)
input_schema.persona_context: object — {resolved: {VARIABLE_NAME: value, ...}, missing: [VARIABLE_NAME, ...]}. `missing` lists variables referenced in the template but absent from the lead row.
input_schema.edp_register: string — segment EDPs joined as a text block; empty string if unavailable

output_schema.pass: boolean — true only if no high-severity findings
output_schema.findings: array<{severity: 'low'|'medium'|'high', category: string, message: string, excerpt: string}>

provisional_reason: Ships with 15 hand-authored synthetic examples. Real dogfood examples replace these in Phase 3.5 refinement.
